verse_text: having a form of godliness but denying its power. And from such people turn away!

pericope.title: Moral Decline in the Last Days

links.context: , 2 The people, called by the name of Israel, "having a form of godliness but denying its power" ([[2TI.3:5]]), cannot lay claim to a true inheritance of truth or righteousness. This is also a warning to the Church never to be Christians in name only.

The Lord specifies that those most responsible for Israel's apostasy are her leaders. What is wrong? They do not know Me. Throughout Christian history there have been many secular and religious leaders open to the same charge. St. Paul advises, "from such people turn away!" ([[2TI.3:5]]).
